hero.title: Proofs, key details, and terms in one polished view.
hero.subtitle: Review the proof and payment gallery first, then scroll into a clean placeholder section built for highlights, privacy notes, and terms you can swap later.

stats.layout_value: Proof + payment stay paired together for fast review.

gallery.title: Proof board
gallery.note: Every card keeps the full proof and payment visible so the gallery stays clean, readable, and easy to scan on desktop or mobile.
gallery.empty_body: Your proof and payment pairs will appear here after the first upload.

overview.title: Professional access and security, simplified.
overview.note: Unlock advanced capabilities, enhanced privacy controls, and direct, one-time pricing—all built to empower your workflow.

benefits.title: Exclusive Benefits
items: + Smarter Reasoning: Full access to GPT-4o and the latest advanced models.
+ Higher Limits: Increased message caps and expanded file upload capacity.
+ Creative Tools: Use DALL-E for image generation and Data Analysis for spreadsheets.
+ Enhanced Features: Full access to Memory, Custom GPT Agents, and Deep Research.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
items: - 100% Private: This is NOT a shared account. You get a unique login with your own private history.
- Full Ownership: Created with a fresh email. The email is fully changeable once you receive it.
- High Reliability: Personally activated to ensure the subscription lasts the full term without being revoked or deactivated.
- Secure Handoff: Instant delivery of credentials as soon as your setup is confirmed.

items.label: Duration
items.value: 30 days of active Plus subscription from the date of purchase.
